projects.title: oladoc — Healthcare Platform
projects.description: Pakistan's leading digital healthcare platform to find and book doctors, hospitals, lab tests, and video consultations. Serves millions of patients with in-clinic and tele-consultation booking across major cities.
highlights: Search and discovery optimized with Elasticsearch and Algolia
Performance work including critical CSS and page optimizations
Google AMP implemented on high-traffic mobile pages

projects.title: SeeBiz — B2B Wholesale Marketplace
projects.description: B2B wholesale marketplace and social networking platform where suppliers, distributors, and retailers connect, trade, and grow. Features tier pricing, RFQ, inventory tools, and multi-industry product catalogs.
highlights: Elastic Search features for marketplace product discovery
Seebiz.com wholesale marketplace core platform
Inventory management module as part of the product suite

projects.title: Lango — Language Access Platform
projects.description: Full-service language access company offering on-site and virtual interpretation, ASL, translation, and AI-enabled machine translation — managed through the secure Lango Central platform for healthcare, legal, government, and enterprise clients.
highlights: Language translation and interpreting services platform
Document translation and interpreting service workflows
Enterprise language access portal for multiple industries

projects.title: Second Vintage — Watch Auctions
projects.description: Premier vintage watch auction platform for collectors and dealers. Live marketplace focused on authenticated timepieces and auction-style buying experiences.
highlights: Vintage watch auction browsing and bidding experience
Product catalog tailored for luxury collectibles
Mobile-responsive marketplace UI

projects.title: Twisted VoIP — Business Communications
projects.description: Business communications and connectivity solutions provider offering VoIP, unified communications, and telecom services for modern businesses.
highlights: Business VoIP and connectivity services marketing site
Lead generation and service plan presentation
Enterprise communications solution showcase

projects.title: eJuno — Destination Wedding Platform
projects.description: Curated wedding planning platform for destination celebrations — venue booking, vendor marketplace, registry, guest lists, budgeting, and VR venue previews for couples planning weddings in Italy and beyond.
highlights: Venue and vendor discovery for destination weddings
Couple planning tools — registry, guest list, budget, seating
VR experience to preview venues and wedding setups

projects.title: SellTime — CMS & E-Commerce Portal
projects.description: CMS and e-commerce web portal for managing online sales, product catalogs, and business operations through a unified SellTime platform.
highlights: Unified CMS and e-commerce back-office portal
Product and sales management for merchants
Customer-facing commerce workflows

projects.title: 401kplans.com — Retirement Plan Marketplace
projects.description: Digital 401(k) retirement plan marketplace for financial advisors and third-party administrators — benchmark providers, run documented due diligence, compare recordkeepers, and request proposals with instant pricing from integrated plan providers. Built from scratch; the platform was later acquired by Envestnet in 2022. (Archived — screenshots to be added.)
highlights: 401(k) provider marketplace built from the ground up
Advisor due diligence and proposal workflow digitized
Elasticsearch-powered search and discovery across plan providers
Redis-backed caching for high-traffic advisor workflows

projects.title: TalentedHuman — Social Network
projects.description: Social networking platform connecting professionals and communities — web and mobile experience with real-time messaging, feeds, and social features. Originally developed for the TalentedHuman team (founder Matthew Colletti); mobile app delivery was also handled by partner studios including Laicos and Bayshore Solutions. (Archived — screenshots to be added.)
highlights: Full-stack social network with MongoDB document storage
Real-time notifications and chat via Node.js and Socket.io
AngularJS SPA with Laravel API backend
Redis for caching and broadcast event scaling

projects.title: Bestat — Real-Time Web Platform
projects.description: Real-time web application with live updates, dashboards, and interactive user flows — Laravel API backend with an AngularJS front end and a dedicated Node.js + Socket.io layer for push events, backed by Redis. (Archived — limited public footprint; screenshots to be added.)
highlights: Hybrid Laravel + Node.js architecture for real-time features
AngularJS client with live Socket.io event streams
Redis-backed session, cache, and pub/sub layer
End-to-end development through deployment

projects.title: BedderOne — Travel & Host Matchmaking
projects.description: Social travel platform matching hosts who have a spare room with travelers looking for affordable or social stays — geo-location discovery, date and country filters, and direct host–guest contact without middlemen. Described as an Airbnb-adjacent matchmaking experience with dating-app-style UX. Built from scratch (frontend and backend). (Archived — screenshots to be added.)
highlights: Built from scratch — full frontend and backend ownership
Location-based host and traveler matching
Real-time chat and notifications with Socket.io
Angular 4+ SPA with Laravel API and deployment pipeline

projects.title: POS System — Point of Sale
projects.description: Retail point-of-sale web application for in-store billing, product lookup, and checkout workflows — responsive Bootstrap UI on a CodeIgniter PHP backend for lightweight deployment on shared hosting.
highlights: In-store POS billing and checkout flows
Product catalog and inventory lookup
Responsive Bootstrap interface for counter tablets
CodeIgniter MVC backend with MySQL

projects.title: WITS — Real-Time Quiz Competition Platform
projects.description: A live synchronized quiz/buzzer platform where participants at multiple venues receive identical questions at the same time. Winners are determined by answer accuracy and response speed. Built for multi-location competitions with live scoreboards, session management, and admin tooling.
apis: REST API — quiz sessions, users, results
WebSocket events — answer submission & winner detection
highlights: Backend engineer — designed and built core REST and real-time APIs
Socket-based question delivery so all venues see the same question simultaneously
First-correct-answer winner logic with countdown timers per question
Live scoreboard and ranking updates pushed over WebSockets
Mobile push notifications for iOS and Android (session alerts, round start)
Quiz session management, authentication, and admin APIs for quiz creation
Result history and analytics endpoints for post-event reporting

projects.title: Document Classification — AI Pipeline
projects.description: Machine-learning pipeline for automatically classifying uploaded documents — PDFs, scanned images, and forms — into categories. Combines OCR text extraction with NLP and LLM-based classification for high-volume document workflows. (Project offline — screenshots preserved.)
highlights: Unified OCR layer supporting Tesseract and cloud OCR providers
Trainable classifiers with FastText, transformer models, and LLM inference
Batch upload, preview, and confidence scoring in admin UI
Built for legal, healthcare, and enterprise document workflows

projects.title: Interview AI Assistance
projects.description: Interview-style AI assistant that lets visitors explore a developer's portfolio through natural conversation — ask for project lists, drill into specific work, skills, APIs, and background as if in a technical interview. (Project offline — screenshots preserved.)
highlights: Knowledge base synced from portfolio JSON — projects, skills, experience
Project-specific deep-dive responses when asked by name
Rule-based mimic AI with a clear upgrade path to LLM/RAG
Embeddable chat widget for multilingual portfolio sites

projects.title: AI-Powered Portfolio (This Site)
projects.description: Multilingual portfolio with JSON-driven content, admin CMS, contact form, and AI chat assistant. Built for free static hosting with optional serverless API routes.
highlights: Multilingual support (EN / AR / DE) with RTL
Browser admin CMS editing JSON content files
Fully deployable on Vercel with custom domain
